text: I just found out the grant was approved, and the whole team is gathering in the conference room to share the news.
The old theater is closing after decades, and the final show ended with people standing silently in the aisles.
The meeting time changed again, so I updated the calendar, notified the attendees, and moved the notes into the new folder.
My coworker presented my analysis as his own, including the charts I made last night, and nobody corrected him.
